instructions.instruction: Generate idempotent tasks; NEVER use shell/command modules where a purpose-built module exists.
NEVER store plaintext secrets in playbooks or inventory; use Ansible Vault or a secrets lookup.
Use handlers for service restarts triggered by notify, not unconditional restart tasks.
Scaffold roles with the standard directory layout (tasks/, handlers/, defaults/, templates/, meta/).
Pin collection versions in requirements.yml for any non-builtin module used.
Set become only where privilege escalation is required, not globally by default.
